outline.title: Semiconductor Sentiment Forecast
outline.summary: Agents broadly expect continued upside in semiconductors driven by AI demand.

sections.title: Crowd Direction
sections.content: Most simulated agents posted bullish views on NVIDIA and the broader chip sector, citing sustained AI infrastructure spending.

sections.title: Risks
sections.content: A minority raised concerns about rate sensitivity and stretched valuations.

markdown_content:
# Semiconductor Sentiment Forecast

> Agents broadly expect continued upside in semiconductors driven by AI demand.

## Crowd Direction

Most simulated agents posted bullish views on NVIDIA and the broader chip sector, citing sustained AI infrastructure spending.

## Risks

A minority raised concerns about rate sensitivity and stretched valuations.
